summary: Frontend-only testing of 7-point UI/UX polish for Luna Group VIP mobile app. All 7 UI polish items verified and working correctly: SectionTitle component, EmptyState component, Primary CTAs, 3-column grid, Demo Mode banner, Shimmer loaders, and Trending grid layout.

issues: Stats grid shows skeleton loaders but data doesn't load - may be API timing issue or cache not populated

critical_code_review_comments: All 7 UI polish items implemented correctly
SectionTitle component properly renders icon, title, and See All button
EmptyState component has proper styling with icon, title, subtitle, and action button
Primary CTAs use LinearGradient with correct colors (blue for Tonight's Pass, gold for VIP Tables)
3-column grid uses flexWrap with proper width calculations
Demo Mode banner has orange styling with flask icon and PREVIEW badge
Shimmer/skeleton loaders use react-native-reanimated for smooth animations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 UI polish items verified: 1) SectionTitle on Home/Wallet/Profile, 2) EmptyState component ready for empty arrays, 3) Primary CTAs (Tonight's Pass blue, VIP Tables gold) full-width on Profile, 4) 3-column grid for secondary actions, 5) Demo Mode banner on Wallet with orange styling, 6) Shimmer loaders on Home/Profile, 7) Trending 2-column grid with numbered rankings.

5_demo_mode_banner.styling: Orange gradient background, flask icon, PREVIEW badge
